content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents can gate which episodic memory tokens are retained in working memory via attention-weighted retention, where high-attention memory traces from unexpected episodic events are prioritized for long-term working retention over low-curiosity, familiar events. This creates a dynamically bounded working memory that automatically expands capacity for high-information episodes while pruning redundant low-value content.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
